reviews.review_title: This looks like a really stupid game
reviews.review_description:
Update: ok so I was right this game is absolutely stupid and absolutely fun. It’s my bucket now bolt boy. 


I can’t believe I paid a dollar for this. I haven’t even played it yet. This looks stupid but also it looks kind of fun.  Space bucket omfg seriously. I have to say though it’s a dollar and it’s called space bucket. I’d gladly pay a dollar for a stupid game as long as I can tell my friends I have (a) “Space Bucket”   Once I play I’ll leave an actual review but I mean you got me to buy it on the name alone so good job.

developer_response.body: Dear valued customer, thank you for your purchase!  We hope that your spacefaring receptacle brings you many hours of injury-free and bliss-filled entertainment!

reviews.review_title: I really don’t know why I bought this
reviews.review_description: It has a decent sense of humor. There really isn’t any story it’s just a vr arcade game where you catch lasers in a bucket them fill the bucket with laser juice. That’s pretty much it I mean I don’t regret buying it. It’s only a dollar.
